# E-Commerce Platform Brief

## Project Overview
We need to build a modern e-commerce platform for a mid-sized retail company that currently sells through physical stores and wants to expand to online sales.

## Business Context
- Company: "UrbanStyle Retail" - fashion and lifestyle retailer
- Current operations: 5 physical stores in major cities
- Annual revenue: $5M
- Team size: 50 employees
- Target market: Urban professionals aged 25-40

## Problem Statement
Current limitations:
- No online presence, missing out on e-commerce growth
- Limited reach to customers outside store locations
- No customer data collection for marketing
- Manual inventory management across stores
- No 24/7 sales capability

## Goals
1. Launch e-commerce platform within 6 months
2. Achieve $1M in online sales in first year
3. Integrate with existing inventory system
4. Provide seamless mobile shopping experience
5. Enable marketing automation and customer insights

## Key Features Required
- Product catalog with categories and filters
- Shopping cart and checkout flow
- Payment gateway integration (credit cards, digital wallets)
- User accounts and order history
- Inventory management integration
- Mobile-responsive design
- Search and recommendations
- Admin dashboard for product management
- Order tracking and notifications
- Customer reviews and ratings

## Technical Considerations
- Must handle 10,000+ concurrent users during peak hours
- Integration with existing ERP system (SAP)
- Multi-currency support (IDR, USD, SGD)
- Compliance with Indonesian e-commerce regulations
- SEO-optimized for local markets

## Constraints
- Budget: $200,000 for development
- Timeline: 6 months to launch
- Team: 5 developers, 2 designers, 1 PM
- Must support Indonesian and English languages
- Mobile-first approach required

## Success Metrics
- 50,000 registered users in first 6 months
- 2% conversion rate
- Average order value: $75
- 95% uptime
- < 3 second page load time

## Risks
- Integration complexity with existing ERP
- Security concerns for payment processing
- Performance at scale during peak seasons
- User adoption from existing customer base
